title: Thaye Yashodha
notes: Tamil composition attributed to Oothukadu Venkata Kavi in Todi; Adi tala; a vision of the child Krishna in Yashoda's courtyard; authorship disputed in scholarly literature — some sources attribute it to anonymous folk tradition; the neraval on 'kalinil silambu' is one of the most celebrated moments in the Carnatic concert repertoire
